mapper.sql: from sys_user u inner join sys_user_tenant ut on ut.user_id = u.user_id and ut.status = '0' and ut.del_flag = '0' left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = ut.dept_id and d.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id
mapper.select:
select u.user_id, ut.dept_id, u.tenant_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_name
${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select u.user_id, ut.dept_id, u.tenant_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_name
${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.nick_name, u.user_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_name, d.leader, u1.user_name as leaderName from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = d.leader ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select u.user_id, ut.dept_id, u.nick_name, u.user_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_name, d.leader, u1.user_name as leaderName
left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = d.leader ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, ut.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u inner join sys_user_tenant ut on ut.user_id = u.user_id and ut.status = '0' and ut.del_flag = '0' left join sys_dept d on ut.dept_id = d.dept_id and d.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id and r.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select distinct u.user_id, ut.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u inner join sys_user_tenant ut on ut.user_id = u.user_id and ut.status = '0' and ut.del_flag = '0' left join sys_dept d on ut.dept_id = d.dept_id and d.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id left join sys_user_role sur on u.user_id = sur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = sur.role_id and r.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
